allow: Bash(node -e "const d=require\('./fifa_2026_matchups.json'\); const keys=Object.keys\(d\); console.log\('Total entries:', keys.length\); console.log\('First key:', keys[0]\); const first=d[keys[0]]; console.log\('First value keys:', Object.keys\(first\)\); console.log\('First value:', JSON.stringify\(first\)\); console.log\('Last key:', keys[keys.length-1]\); console.log\('Last value:', JSON.stringify\(d[keys[keys.length-1]]\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\); const raw=fs.readFileSync\('matches_data.json.txt','utf8'\); const data=JSON.parse\(raw\); const r32=data.filter\(m=>m.match_number>=73&&m.match_number<=88\); r32.forEach\(m=>console.log\(m.match_number, JSON.stringify\({hp:m.home_placeholder,ap:m.away_placeholder,hid:m.home_team_id,aid:m.away_team_id}\)\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\); const raw=fs.readFileSync\('matches_data.json.txt','utf8'\); const data=JSON.parse\(raw\); const r32=data.filter\(m=>m.match_number>=73&&m.match_number<=88\); console.log\(JSON.stringify\(r32[0],null,2\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\); const raw=fs.readFileSync\('matches_data.json.txt','utf8'\); const data=JSON.parse\(raw\); const r32=data.filter\(m=>m.match_number>=73&&m.match_number<=88\); r32.forEach\(m=>console.log\(m.match_number, m.home, m.away\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const d=require\('./fifa_2026_matchups.json'\); const keys=Object.keys\(d\); const allValueKeys=new Set\(\); keys.forEach\(k=>Object.keys\(d[k]\).forEach\(vk=>allValueKeys.add\(vk\)\)\); console.log\('All value keys \(slot letters\):', [...allValueKeys].sort\(\).join\(','\)\); const first=d[keys[0]]; const allValues=Object.values\(first\); console.log\('First entry values \(3rd-place groups\):', allValues.sort\(\).join\(','\)\);")
